content: pygame-ce (Community Edition) is the actively maintained fork of pygame since original pygame's development stalled; pygame-ce has frequent releases (v2.5.7 as of Feb/Mar 2026), SDL2-based, adds convenience functions and perf improvements, and is what pygame_gui now targets. Original pygame last stable was 2.6.1 (Sept 2024) with slow development. Recommend pygame-ce for new projects.
